Riak CS incompatible with Riak 2.0
Riak CS cannot currently be used with Riak versions 2.0 and later. A version compatibility table can be found immediately below.


What is "CS" ?


also: http://docs.basho.com/riakcs/latest/cookbooks/Version-Compatibility/
